title: New Stars Cobble [1.7 Fresh WIPE]
body:
🌾 Welcome to New Stars 🐾 A Vanilla+ Minecraft server where cozy farming meets thrilling creature collecting!

Step into a world where the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft is enhanced with gentle, immersive upgrades. Explore lush biomes teeming with wild Cobblemon to catch, train, and battle. Build your dream homestead with Stardew Valley-inspired farming, fishing, and seasonal festivals. Whether you're tending crops, befriending villagers, or adventuring with your favorite Cobblemon, Meadowfall Realms offers a relaxing yet engaging multiplayer experience.

✨ Features Include:

🐉 Cobblemon integration for creature collecting and battling

🌽 Stardew-style farming, cooking, and seasonal events

🛠️ Vanilla+ enhancements for smoother gameplay and quality of life

🏡 Player-run towns, cozy aesthetics, and community-driven economy

🌙 Peaceful solo play or vibrant multiplayer adventures
